# F036 Retrieval Failure Localization

## Decision
`F036_RECALL_FAILURE_PRIMARILY_MARGIN_INSTABILITY`

## Purpose
F035 improved mean transition and delta cosine but violated held-out recall no-regression. F036 reruns the same low-compute deterministic setup and localizes whether the recall loss is caused by near-tie retrieval instability or by the residual crossing a real endpoint nearest-neighbor boundary.

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.620000`
- selected transition: `0.340385`
- floor transition: `0.333054`
- selected delta cosine: `0.936656`
- floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- selected recall@1: `0.851852`
- floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.007331` (min `0.001891`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.024433` (min `0.003504`)
- selected floor gap recall: `-0.007407` (min `-0.111111`)

## Retrieval Failure Summary
- broken rows: `7`
- repaired rows: `6`
- broken near-tie fraction: `1.000000`
- broken mean floor margin: `0.003035`
- broken mean selected margin: `-0.001584`
- mean margin change: `0.017646`
- mean rank change: `-0.059259`
- selected median rank: `1.000000`

## Interpretation
Next branch should test a train-only retrieval-margin risk gate or endpoint+delta composite objective; do not relax recall gates post hoc.

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. This is a diagnostic-only held-out failure localization; held-out target labels are not used to select a deployable residual.
